title: crassocephalum butaguense
intro: Crassocephalum butaguense is a perennial plant species native to East Africa, specifically in Kenya, and is also known as Butaguene. It belongs to the family Asteraceae and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Crassocephalum butaguense include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
